function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_irq_fabric.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_irq_fabric
description: >
  Verifies the Hazard3 PLIC interrupt fabric of mspm33c321a_derivative.
  Tests cover all 26 peripheral IRQ sources asserting correctly to the PLIC,
  PLIC claim/complete handshake for acknowledgment, priority arbitration
  between simultaneous IRQs, and nested-interrupt preemption (IRQ nesting).
checklist_ids:
  - IRQ-01
  - IRQ-02
  - IRQ-03
  - IRQ-04
test_names:
  - test_irq_all_sources
  - test_irq_ack_clear
  - test_irq_priority
  - test_irq_nesting
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: uart_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart0_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart0_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: i2c_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c0_sda
      scl: i2c0_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x50
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000

irq_map:
  - irq: 0  ; source: GPIOA
  - irq: 1  ; source: GPIOB
  - irq: 2  ; source: GPIOC
  - irq: 3  ; source: UART0
  - irq: 4  ; source: UART1
  - irq: 5  ; source: UART2
  - irq: 6  ; source: UART3
  - irq: 7  ; source: SPI0
  - irq: 8  ; source: SPI1
  - irq: 9  ; source: I2C0
  - irq: 10 ; source: I2C1
  - irq: 11 ; source: I2C2
  - irq: 12 ; source: TMR0
  - irq: 13 ; source: TMR1
  - irq: 14 ; source: TMR2
  - irq: 15 ; source: TMR3
  - irq: 16 ; source: TMR4
  - irq: 17 ; source: TMR5
  - irq: 18 ; source: PWM0
  - irq: 19 ; source: PWM1
  - irq: 20 ; source: DMAC0
  - irq: 21 ; source: CRC0
  - irq: 22 ; source: AES0
  - irq: 23 ; source: WWDT0
  - irq: 24 ; source: RTC0
  - irq: 25 ; source: SYSTICK0

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; PLIC in default state (all IRQs disabled, priority 0)
  - step: 2
    action: plic_enable_all_irqs
    description: Enable all 26 IRQ sources in PLIC enable registers
  - step: 3
    action: plic_set_threshold
    level: 0
    description: Set PLIC claim threshold to 0 (allow any priority through)
  - step: 4
    action: trigger_each_peripheral_irq
    method: minimal_stimulus
    description: >
      Trigger each peripheral IRQ in sequence using minimal stimulus:
      UART TX-empty, SPI done, I2C done, TMR overflow, DMA complete, CRC done,
      AES done, WWDT early-warning, RTC alarm, SysTick underflow, GPIO edge.
  - step: 5
    action: verify_plic_pending
    all_irqs: true
    description: Confirm each peripheral sets corresponding PLIC pending bit
  - step: 6
    action: plic_claim_all_irqs
    description: CPU claims each pending IRQ in order; verify claim register returns correct source ID
  - step: 7
    action: plic_complete_all_irqs
    description: CPU completes each IRQ; verify pending bits clear after complete
  - step: 8
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: PLIC
    register: PENDING0
    expected: 0x00000000
    description: Verify all pending bits cleared after claim/complete cycle
  - step: 9
    action: plic_set_priority
    irq_high: 12
    priority_high: 7
    irq_low: 3
    priority_low: 1
    description: Set TMR0 (IRQ12) to priority 7, UART0 (IRQ3) to priority 1
  - step: 10
    action: trigger_simultaneous_irqs
    irqs: [3, 12]
    description: Simultaneously trigger UART0 and TMR0 IRQs
  - step: 11
    action: verify_claim_order
    expected_first: 12
    description: Verify PLIC claim returns IRQ12 (higher priority) first
  - step: 12
    action: plic_set_priority
    irq_outer: 3
    priority_outer: 1
    irq_inner: 12
    priority_inner: 7
    description: Configure nested IRQ scenario: outer ISR priority 1, inner IRQ priority 7
  - step: 13
    action: trigger_nested_irq_sequence
    outer_irq: 3
    inner_irq: 12
    description: Assert UART0 IRQ; while in UART0 ISR, assert TMR0 (higher priority); verify preemption

checks:
  - id: CHK-IRQ-01
    checklist_id: IRQ-01
    description: All 26 peripheral IRQs set corresponding PLIC pending bit when triggered
    expected: PLIC pending registers show each source asserted in sequence
  - id: CHK-IRQ-02
    checklist_id: IRQ-02
    description: PLIC claim/complete handshake clears pending bit for each IRQ
    expected: PENDING0/PENDING1 == 0 after all claims completed
  - id: CHK-IRQ-03
    checklist_id: IRQ-03
    description: Simultaneous UART0 (P1) and TMR0 (P7) — PLIC claims TMR0 first
    expected: First claim returns source ID 12 (TMR0)
  - id: CHK-IRQ-04
    checklist_id: IRQ-04
    description: TMR0 (P7) preempts UART0 ISR (P1); preemption observed in PC trace
    expected: PC branches to TMR0 ISR before UART0 ISR completes

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-IRQ checks PASS
  - No spurious IRQs observed
  - All 26 source IDs returned correctly from PLIC claim register
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_irq_fabric
description: >
  Verifies the Hazard3 PLIC interrupt fabric of mspm33c321a_derivative.
  Tests cover all 26 peripheral IRQ sources asserting correctly to the PLIC,
  PLIC claim/complete handshake for acknowledgment, priority arbitration
  between simultaneous IRQs, and nested-interrupt preemption (IRQ nesting).
checklist_ids:
  - IRQ-01
  - IRQ-02
  - IRQ-03
  - IRQ-04
test_names:
  - test_irq_all_sources
  - test_irq_ack_clear
  - test_irq_priority
  - test_irq_nesting
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: uart_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart0_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart0_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: i2c_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c0_sda
      scl: i2c0_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x50
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000

irq_map:
  - irq: 0  ; source: GPIOA
  - irq: 1  ; source: GPIOB
  - irq: 2  ; source: GPIOC
  - irq: 3  ; source: UART0
  - irq: 4  ; source: UART1
  - irq: 5  ; source: UART2
  - irq: 6  ; source: UART3
  - irq: 7  ; source: SPI0
  - irq: 8  ; source: SPI1
  - irq: 9  ; source: I2C0
  - irq: 10 ; source: I2C1
  - irq: 11 ; source: I2C2
  - irq: 12 ; source: TMR0
  - irq: 13 ; source: TMR1
  - irq: 14 ; source: TMR2
  - irq: 15 ; source: TMR3
  - irq: 16 ; source: TMR4
  - irq: 17 ; source: TMR5
  - irq: 18 ; source: PWM0
  - irq: 19 ; source: PWM1
  - irq: 20 ; source: DMAC0
  - irq: 21 ; source: CRC0
  - irq: 22 ; source: AES0
  - irq: 23 ; source: WWDT0
  - irq: 24 ; source: RTC0
  - irq: 25 ; source: SYSTICK0

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; PLIC in default state (all IRQs disabled, priority 0)
  - step: 2
    action: plic_enable_all_irqs
    description: Enable all 26 IRQ sources in PLIC enable registers
  - step: 3
    action: plic_set_threshold
    level: 0
    description: Set PLIC claim threshold to 0 (allow any priority through)
  - step: 4
    action: trigger_each_peripheral_irq
    method: minimal_stimulus
    description: >
      Trigger each peripheral IRQ in sequence using minimal stimulus:
      UART TX-empty, SPI done, I2C done, TMR overflow, DMA complete, CRC done,
      AES done, WWDT early-warning, RTC alarm, SysTick underflow, GPIO edge.
  - step: 5
    action: verify_plic_pending
    all_irqs: true
    description: Confirm each peripheral sets corresponding PLIC pending bit
  - step: 6
    action: plic_claim_all_irqs
    description: CPU claims each pending IRQ in order; verify claim register returns correct source ID
  - step: 7
    action: plic_complete_all_irqs
    description: CPU completes each IRQ; verify pending bits clear after complete
  - step: 8
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: PLIC
    register: PENDING0
    expected: 0x00000000
    description: Verify all pending bits cleared after claim/complete cycle
  - step: 9
    action: plic_set_priority
    irq_high: 12
    priority_high: 7
    irq_low: 3
    priority_low: 1
    description: Set TMR0 (IRQ12) to priority 7, UART0 (IRQ3) to priority 1
  - step: 10
    action: trigger_simultaneous_irqs
    irqs: [3, 12]
    description: Simultaneously trigger UART0 and TMR0 IRQs
  - step: 11
    action: verify_claim_order
    expected_first: 12
    description: Verify PLIC claim returns IRQ12 (higher priority) first
  - step: 12
    action: plic_set_priority
    irq_outer: 3
    priority_outer: 1
    irq_inner: 12
    priority_inner: 7
    description: Configure nested IRQ scenario: outer ISR priority 1, inner IRQ priority 7
  - step: 13
    action: trigger_nested_irq_sequence
    outer_irq: 3
    inner_irq: 12
    description: Assert UART0 IRQ; while in UART0 ISR, assert TMR0 (higher priority); verify preemption

checks:
  - id: CHK-IRQ-01
    checklist_id: IRQ-01
    description: All 26 peripheral IRQs set corresponding PLIC pending bit when triggered
    expected: PLIC pending registers show each source asserted in sequence
  - id: CHK-IRQ-02
    checklist_id: IRQ-02
    description: PLIC claim/complete handshake clears pending bit for each IRQ
    expected: PENDING0/PENDING1 == 0 after all claims completed
  - id: CHK-IRQ-03
    checklist_id: IRQ-03
    description: Simultaneous UART0 (P1) and TMR0 (P7) — PLIC claims TMR0 first
    expected: First claim returns source ID 12 (TMR0)
  - id: CHK-IRQ-04
    checklist_id: IRQ-04
    description: TMR0 (P7) preempts UART0 ISR (P1); preemption observed in PC trace
    expected: PC branches to TMR0 ISR before UART0 ISR completes

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-IRQ checks PASS
  - No spurious IRQs observed
  - All 26 source IDs returned correctly from PLIC claim register
